case_title: ALBERTO A. SANCHEZ VS. LOCHLAINN OSHEA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2012 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE QUEENA HO. FILED BY SANCHEZ, ALBERTO A. OSHEA, LOCHLAINN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT OSHEA, LOCHLAINN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,116.15 FILED BY SANCHEZ, ALBERTO A. AS TO DEFENDANT OSHEA, LOCHLAINN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED SEP-17-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OSHEA, LOCHLAINN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, ALBERTO A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OSHEA, LOCHLAINN $1,116.15 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,181.15 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2013 ORDERED DESTROYED
